name: Chris Benoit
title: Last known photo of Chris Benoit, taken approximately a week before his death, posing with a fan at his physician Dr. Phil Astin's office in Carrollton, Georgia.
description: The last known photo of Chris Benoit was taken approximately a week before his death, showing him posing with a fan at the office of his personal physician, Dr. Phil Astin, in Carrollton, Georgia, near Atlanta. On Friday night, June 22, 2007, Benoit strangled his wife Nancy at their home in Fayetteville, Georgia. On Saturday morning he suffocated his seven-year-old son Daniel, who had been sedated with Xanax. On Sunday evening, June 24, Benoit hanged himself using a lat pulldown machine. The bodies were discovered by police on Monday afternoon, June 25. Investigators seized medical records and found anabolic steroids in the home, and a subsequent examination of Benoit's brain revealed severe chronic traumatic encephalopathy (CTE) from years of untreated concussions. He was 40 years old. WWE removed nearly all references to Benoit from their programming following the tragedy.
bio: Chris Benoit was a Canadian professional wrestler known for his technical skill and intensity. He held world championships in both WWE and WCW during his two-decade career.

location.name: Dr. Phil Astin's Office, 702 Dixie St, Carrollton, GA 30117
